title: Crazy Jane Reproved
content:
I care not what the sailors say:
All those dreadful thunder-stones,
All that storm that blots the day
Can but show that Heaven yawns;
Great Europa played the fool
That changed a lover for a bull.
Fol de rol, fol de rol.

To round that shell's elaborate whorl,
Adorning every secret track
With the delicate mother-of-pearl,
Made the joints of Heaven crack:
So never hang your heart upon
A roaring, ranting journeyman.
Fol de rol, fol de rol.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "Crazy Jane Reproved"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
